title: The Account of the Cause of the Uprising of 'Abdallah (b. Mu'awiyah) and of His Summoning the People to Himself
description: 'Abdallah (b. Mu'dwiyah) and of His Summoning the People to Himself According to Hisham (b. Muhammad al-Kalbi)-Abu Mikhnaf: 'Abdallah b. Mu'awiyah rebelled against 'Abdallah b. 'Umar and declared war on him in Muharram 12 7 (October 1 3, 744November i i, 744). 1228

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
